title: mmpviz diagram.json
description: Semantic description of a memory map diagram for the mmpviz renderer.

_comment.description: Optional human-readable notes for authors; ignored by the renderer and layout engine.

views.description: Display viewport definitions. Each view declares its own sections.

links.description: Cross-view connections rendered as zoom bands.

hex_or_int.description: Memory address or byte count. Accepts a non-negative integer or a hex/decimal string.

view.description: One memory view panel in the SVG diagram.

id.description: Unique identifier across the entire diagram. Used as a key in theme.json.

title.description: Label shown above the view panel.

labels.description: Address annotation labels for this view.

section.description: One contiguous memory region displayed in a view.

id.description: Identifier unique within this view. Used as a key in theme.json under views[view_id].sections.

address.description: Start address of this memory region.

size.description: Size of this memory region in bytes.

name.description: Display text shown inside the section box. Use empty string to suppress.

min_height.description: Pixel height floor for this section. Effective floor = max(min_height, theme min_section_height).

max_height.description: Pixel height ceiling for this section. Effective ceiling = min(max_height, theme max_section_height).

label.description: Annotated leader line pointing to a specific address.

id.description: Unique identifier within this view. Used as a key in theme.json under views[view_id].labels.

address.description: Memory address where the label points.

length.description: Length of the annotation line in pixels. Default: 20.

side.description: Which side of the panel to draw the label. Default: 'right'.

link.description: Cross-view connection rendered as a zoom band.

id.description: Unique identifier across all links. Used as a key in theme.json under links.overrides.

link_endpoint.description: One end of a cross-view link.

view.description: View id. Must match a views[].id in this diagram.

sections.description: Section IDs or ['0xSTART', '0xEND'] address range that the band anchors to. Omit to use the view's full address range.
